nasb.text: He will abide before God forever; Appoint lovingkindness and truth that they may preserve him.

esv.text: May he be enthroned forever before God; appoint steadfast love and faithfulness to watch over him!

cnv.text: 願他在　神面前永遠作王； 願你指派慈愛和誠實保護他。

ccb.text: 愿他在你的护佑下永远做王， 求你以慈爱和信实来保护他。

csbs.text: 愿他永远住在神的面前， 求你指派慈爱和信实守护他。
